headline: 3 Companies Reporting Record Results This Earnings Season
summary: The 2026 Q1 earnings season continues to be one of positivity, with many notable companies - Newmont (NEM), Interactive Brokers (IBKR), and Quanta Services (PWR) - all knocking it out of the park, reporting quarterly records in one way or another.

headline: Inside India newsletter: Social media is reshaping the world's fastest-growing market for global brands
summary: Social media influencers are urging consumers to read labels and pushing traditional companies to make healthier products or risk being replaced by newer entrants.

headline: This $4 Million NMI Holdings Sale Comes as the Insurer Grows Book Value 15%

headline: Barrick Mining Stock Down 6% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
summary: B shares drop 6% in a month on weaker gold prices, but strong cash flows, growth projects and a solid dividend keep the investment case intact.

headline: Copper, Silver, Gold Price Jump As Oil Dives. These Stocks Are Near Buy Points.
summary: Copper and gold prices jumped over 3% early Wednesday, while silver surged around 6% after President Donald Trump called off "Project Freedom," which had threatened the ceasefire between Iran and the U.S. military in the Strait of Hormuz.  Copper giant Freeport-McMoRan and gold and silver miner Newmont were among the top S&P 500 stock advancers ahead of the open.  The list includes BHP Group, Rio Tinto, Vale.
